title: upgrade procs
text: upgrade procs Upgrade Sybase connector U2 stored procedures to match the current version. USYS$SYB_PARAMS = upgrade procs Description When this option is enabled, the Create Table utility produces SQL that drops SYB U2 stored procedures and creates SYB stored procedures for the current connector version. When the disable numerics option is also set, as in the following example, the SYB stored procedures for the current connector version are created without numeric support: USYS$SYB_PARAMS = upgrade procs, disable numerics Copy Note: If you want to disable numerics, you must enable both the upgrade procs and disable numerics options before running the Create Table utility. Related Links Sybase Stored Procedures The SYB connector supports the use of Sybase stored procedures. These can also be activated as service stored procedures. disable numerics Disable support for numeric and identity data types. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
